items.name_en: ❤️ White Multicolore Small! M13744 Cosmetic Bag! Collab with Takashi Murakami! POCHETTE COSMETIQUE PM
items.name_cn:
❤️ White Multicolore Small! M13744 Cosmetic Bag! Collab with Takashi Murakami! POCHETTE COSMETIQUE PM
This compact cosmetic bag is made of Monogram canvas and easily fits inside a handbag. The round body with a flat bottom design makes it convenient to take out makeup items.
19.0 x 12.0 x 6.0 cm
(Long x Height x Width)
- Coated canvas fabric with washable fabric lining
- Gold metal hardware
- Zip closure
- Internal patch pocket
- Washable fabric lining

items.name_cn:
M82144 Pink
Crafted from grained Taurillon leather, this piece features a color contrast between the interior and exterior. The LV monogram slide fastener draws inspiration from the Capucines handbag's closure design. The exquisite structure conceals ample space, featuring a card slot and a zippered accordion pocket for coins.
9 x 12 x 1 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

specs.rawTitle:
M82144 Pink

(Length x Height x Width)

items.name_cn:
🆕 M12656 Yellow! BRAZZA Wallet
This Brazza wallet is crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas, witnessing Pharrell Williams' fresh interpretation of the iconic Monogram pattern. The interlaced texture and Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo showcase classic elements of the original Damier print, paired with multiple card slots and compartments, ensuring the long design retains functional details.
19 x 2 x 10 cm
(Height x Width x Length)

items.name_cn:
🆕 M12657 Yellow! MULTIPLE Wallet
This Multiple wallet exudes a modern vibe with Monogram Heritage canvas, delicately showcasing details like the interlaced texture and Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo, which are original Damier pattern elements.
9 x 1.5 x 11.5 cm
(Height x Width x Length)

items.name_cn:
🆕 M12664 Yellow! ENVELOPE Card Holder
This card holder features a slim silhouette built with Monogram Heritage canvas, easily fitting into a pocket or handbag. The flap is secured with a hidden snap button, revealing an accordion pocket and card slots upon opening. The calfskin lining and Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo, derived from Damier canvas, add refined details.
8 x 1 x 10.5 cm
(Height x Width x Length)

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
🆕 M12660 Yellow! COIN Wallet
Pharrell Williams incorporates traditional elements of the brand's Damier print into this Coin wallet, featuring interlaced texture and a Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo to creatively reshape the classic Monogram pattern, combining practical function with elegant style.
14.5 x 1 x 8 cm
(Height x Width x Length)
